description_long: This bungalow features a robust wooden structure with a wide, overhanging gable roof in a dark brown hue. The facade is adorned with symmetrical windows, each framed by wooden shutters and decorative grilles, and a prominent central entrance flanked by stone columns. The wraparound porch is supported by sturdy posts and bordered by a low wooden railing, providing ample outdoor space. The upper story displays a series of evenly spaced windows, echoing the symmetry of the lower level. The exterior combines natural wood textures with stone accents, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of Craftsman-style bungalows, emphasizing handcrafted details and a harmonious blend with the environment.
description: A two-story wooden bungalow with a wide gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a wraparound porch accented by stone columns and decorative woodwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the full width of the porch with stone columns.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the porch, the central entrance, and the layered roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical window arrangement and a continuous porch, lacking the prominent entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the rear facade, upper and lower windows, and the porch's extension around the building.
